recommendations.title: Elling
recommendations.overview: 40-year-old Elling, sensitive, would-be poet, is sent to live in a state institution when his mother, who has sheltered him his entire life, dies. There he meets Kjell Bjarne, a gentle giant and female-obsessed virgin, also in his 40s.

recommendations.title: Desire
recommendations.overview: Lucía and Ofelia, two sisters, finally meet after 7 years of cold relationships upon Lucia 's wedding. But when Juan, Lucia's husband, and Ofelia meet, they feel like a disruptive fantasy have enchanted their minds and bodies...

recommendations.title: Gifted
recommendations.overview: Frank, a single man raising his child prodigy niece Mary, is drawn into a custody battle with his mother.

recommendations.title: The Unholy
recommendations.overview: Alice is a young hearing-impaired girl who, after a supposed visitation from the Virgin Mary, is inexplicably able to hear, speak and heal the sick. As word spreads and people from near and far flock to witness her miracles, a disgraced journalist ho

recommendations.title: The Perfect Family
recommendations.overview: Lucía is a woman for whom leading a model life and taking control of her life is the most important thing. Since she got married, she has focused all of her efforts on caring for her family, until achieving what for her is a perfect family. However,

recommendations.title: A Dog's Will
recommendations.overview: The lively João Grilo and the sly Chicó are poor guys living in the hinterland who cheat a bunch of people in a small town in Northeastern Brazil. When they die, they have to be judged by Christ, the Devil and the Virgin Mary before they are admitted

recommendations.title: The Firefly
recommendations.overview: After her estranged brother's sudden death, young wife Lucia bonds with his fiancée through their shared grief and finds herself falling in love.

recommendations.title: Disappearance at Clifton Hill
recommendations.overview: Following the death of her mother, a young woman returns home to Niagara Falls and becomes entangled in the memory of a kidnapping she claims to have witnessed as a child.

recommendations.title: Something New
recommendations.overview: Lucia and Maria are two best friends, who have known each other from the beginning of their life, but have very different tastes and behaviors. Lucia is done with men, Maria, on the contrary, cannot be without one. One night, the perfect man shows up

recommendations.title: The Edukators
recommendations.overview: Three activists cobble together a kidnapping plot after they encounter a businessman in his home.
